content.en:
"Stop that Superior Domain Ancestor!"

The Six-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan was fighting with the Vajra War Ancestor while preaching.

Suddenly, a Four-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan rushed towards Ye Tian.

And the other Silent Annihilation Clans who fought against Ye Tian retreated one after another, not fighting against Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian directly cast the Five Elements Blockade, even in this area, the effect of the Five Elements Prohibition was not satisfactory, but it also trapped these Silent Annihilation Clans in time.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian used the Void Slash Ancestral Technique to bombard the body of a Silent Annihilation Clan, and the other party had no way to resist and was killed in seconds again.

After all, the Silent Annihilation Clan's recovery ability is poor, which is also a flaw of theirs, if it is other non-superior domain ancestors, it is possible to survive, but the Silent Annihilation Clan cannot live.

At this moment, the Four-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan arrived, tore Ye Tian's Five Elements Seal with one hand, and fought with Ye Tian.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian relied on the Eternal Immortal Ancestor and a Famous Ancestor Technique to completely suppress this Four-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan.

"Damn, this Peerless Domain Ancestor is clearly in the early stage of the Peerless Domain Clan after cultivating, but his strength is in the middle of the strength of our Silent Annihilation Clan's Four Patterns and Five Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan!"

The Four-Striped Silencer was surprised.

The Five-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan is comparable to a half-step ancestor, and this span is too big.

Demons!

The Four-Striped Silencer thought to himself.

"Retreat!"

The Six-Striped Silence Clan said.

The original intention of these Silent Annihilation Clan was not to break the defense line, but they just wanted to try to see if they could kill one or two Peerless Domain Ancestors, but they didn't expect to lose two Silent Annihilation Clan.

Soon, the Silencers all retreated.

......

"Wanfa War Ancestor, I didn't expect you to kill two Silent Annihilation Clans, I've been guarding here for so long, and I've only killed one Annihilation Clan!"

Peng Zu was surprised.

"It's just a fluke, they don't know my strength, so they sent some weak people to besiege me, if I knew my strength, I wouldn't be able to kill another Silent Exterminator!" Ye Tian said modestly.

The other Superior Domain Ancestors nodded, this time it was indeed the carelessness of the Silent Annihilation Clan, otherwise it would not be so easy to kill the two Silent Annihilation Clan, even if the Ancestor wanted to kill the Silent Annihilation Clan, it was a little difficult.

After all, once the Ancestor made a move, those Silent Annihilation Clans with more than seven veins would also make a move.

Moreover, in such a time and space, the strength of the ancestor was weakened even more ruthlessly, and it was impossible to crush a peerless domain ancestor with a single thought like the outside world.

King Kong Zhanzu didn't stay here, he left immediately, and everyone also returned to the place where they were guarding, unless they were injured and their resources were exhausted, and there was no way to replenish their energy, they could go back to the Holy Continent to recover first.

Otherwise, they are not allowed to leave here, which is also the reason why the ancestors of the Superior Domain do not want to stay here, it is simply too boring, and they are in a state of mental tension all the time.

If it weren't for the fact that the Superior Domain Ancestors had gone through countless tribulations, and all of them were in a very high state of mind, otherwise they would really collapse.

Return to the town guard.

Ye Tian began to fuse the ancestral endowments from the Silent Annihilation Clan, and one by one the ancestral endowments merged into Ye Tian's soul and became his ancestral endowments.

"Now that I have the Time Ancestor Endowment, I can go and practice the Time Ancestral Technique, and I have the Silent Annihilation Ancestral Endowment, so I don't have to worry about the energy problem!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After fusing the Ancestral Endowment of Silence, he realized the usefulness of this Ancestral Endowment, that is, to manipulate and refine the Ancestral Endowment of Silence, and even to urge the Ancestral Endowment of Silence to affect time and space, this is the effect of the Ancestral Endowment of Immortal Destruction.

Rumble!!!!

The annihilation energy poured into Ye Tian's body, not harming Ye Tian at all.

If it had been before, if he had dared to absorb the energy of annihilation, his physical body would gradually disintegrate, because only the first ancestor would dare to absorb the energy of annihilation.

But now, with the help of the Silent Annihilation Ancestor, Ye Tian can refine the Silent Annihilation Energy.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian was extremely surprised, the Silence Energy could actually quickly enhance his cultivation, and it could also quickly refine his ancestral body.

It's like ...... Make up for the elements of his body in general.

This brand new energy was simply a supreme elixir for him to improve his strength, far more useful than any energy.

"The reason why the Ancestors are willing to guard here is probably because the Silence Energy can help them refine the Ancestors' bodies faster and improve their cultivation, right?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The ancestors did not disclose this news because only the ancestors could refine, and the ancestors of the non-superior domain could not refine, and for the non-superior domain ancestors, the energy of extinction was poison.

If this secret is spoken, I am afraid that many unattained domain ancestors will try frantically, causing a large number of unattained domain ancestors to be severely damaged, so that there is no way to hold this line of defense.

So, the ancestors hid this secret.

"It's a pity that my body isn't here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, his body didn't dare to come here, it was too dangerous, and if the body fell, it really fell.

If you copy the fall of the body, you can condense again.

"If you can get some Silent Destruction Treasures, bring them back when the time comes, and the Ancestral Endowment copied by the copied body can be completely stripped out and given to the Body, so that the Essence can also obtain the Ancestral Endowment of Silence without coming here!

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to absorb and refine the Silence Energy, trying to understand the Silence Energy, and at the same time refining the Ancestral Body.

In short, if you can improve your strength a little, you can improve it a little.

......

Annihilation territory.

A group of Silencers are in a meeting, and the leader of them is an Eight-Striped Silencer.

At this time, these Silent Clans are reporting the situation.

"Let's talk about the war situation in the last billion years!"

The Eight Stripes of Silence Annihilation spoke.

"Thirty-one clansmen have been killed, and the other party has no superior domain ancestor warriors eight!"

An Annihilator reported.

"Eight of them died, and we died thirty-one, and you let me down. By the way, twenty-nine died not long ago, right, and two more died during this time?" said the Eight Pattern Silence Clan in a cold voice.

"Not long ago, two of the One-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan fell, the other party was in the early stage of the Superior Domain Ancestor, but their strength was even stronger than the Four-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan!"

A Six-Striped Silencer said.

"What, the Peerless Domain Ancestor was even more powerful than the Four Stripes Silent Annihilation Clan in the early days, and they had such a demon?"

The Eight Lines of Silence Annihilation said solemnly.

"Lord Aolong, that Peerless Domain Ancestor Early Stage Cultivator must be killed, otherwise if he grows up in the future, he may be another Ancestor Level!, and it may even grow into a realm like Lord Aolong!" The Six-Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan suggested.

"That cultivator must be killed, but it must be planned!"

Olon decided.
